videos.headline: Will Sheppard somehow stays inbounds for toe-tap Colorado TD
videos.description: Shedeur Sanders dimes Will Sheppard with a 16-yard dart into the end zone for a Colorado touchdown against Arizona in the second quarter.

videos.headline: Shedeur Sanders' shovel pass puts Colorado up 14-0
